$metadata.author: Usman Hussain
$metadata.scope: Cross-subphase dependency graph for Phase 6.5 Composer.
$metadata.title: Phase 6.5 Composer Dependency Graph v1

nodes.name: Intake, Ratification, and Source-of-Truth Bridge
nodes.summary: Import, metadata, source authority, P-ID correction, suite amendment, ratification packet.
nodes.source_answers: Q6.5-001 through Q6.5-020 plus CD-1 through CD-5

nodes.name: Canonical Configuration and Change Pipeline
nodes.summary: Canonical configuration, composition versions, proposal object, risk classification, one change pipeline.

nodes.name: Primitive Registry, Extension Contracts, and Resolver
nodes.summary: Primitive registry, compatibility contracts, extension registration, resolver, symbolic references.

nodes.name: Authoring Model, Core Graphs, and Permission Composition
nodes.summary: Setup wizard, organization graph, workflow graph, custom fields, permission composition, templates.
nodes.source_answers: Q6.5-071 through Q6.5-080 and Q6.5-141 through Q6.5-143

nodes.name: Delegation, Agreements, Evidence, and Disputes
nodes.summary: Sub-tenant delegation, structured agreements, evidence crossing, reputation protection, disputes.

nodes.name: Money, Cost, External Actions, and Credential Boundaries
nodes.summary: Escrow composition, split rules, refunds, cost honesty, external actions, credential boundary.

nodes.name: Validation, Simulation, Publishing, Runtime, Recovery, and Export
nodes.summary: Validation, simulation, shadow mode, publish, runtime recovery, export/import/off-ramp.
nodes.source_answers: Q6.5-121 through Q6.5-140 and Q6.5-158 through Q6.5-160

nodes.name: Composer Frontend, Figma, Noob-Proof UX, and Visual Acceptance
nodes.summary: Screen contracts, Figma discipline, UI surfaces, visual proof, screenshot evidence.

edges.reason: 6D may plan after selected Composer foundations are runtime-real; execution still depends on consumed foundations
